# accumulate.accumulate_sufficient_statistics { #tspaint.accumulate.accumulate_sufficient_statistics }

```python
tspaint.accumulate.accumulate_sufficient_statistics(
    ts,
    Q,
    pi,
    emissions,
    *,
    labels=None,
    soft_refs=None,
)
```

Single E-step sweep over the tree sequence (CLAUDE.md §3.3).

Drives the genome with ``ts.edge_diffs()`` zipped with ``ts.trees()``, prunes each
marginal tree, and banks each edge's contribution **once on entry, weighted by its
own span** — so a clade persisting across many trees is counted once (the
double-counting fix and the channel for genome-scale autocorrelation). The
expensive Van Loan branch kernel is computed once per distinct branch length and
reused across edges. Root-state mass is accumulated per interval, not per edge.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The (``--compress``ed Relate or tsinfer-native) tree sequence.

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`), [shape](`shape`)([K](`K`), [K](`K`)))]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   CTMC generator (rows sum to zero).

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [([numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`), [shape](`shape`)([K](`K`)))]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Root frequencies.

<code>[**emissions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [array](`array`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-tip emission vectors (labelled refs and queries), as built by :mod:`tspaint.model`.

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Label index per labelled tip, used to accumulate credibility evidence.

<code>[**soft_refs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[set](`set`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Restrict credibility accumulation to these tips (default: all labelled).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[SuffStats](`tspaint.accumulate.SuffStats`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Span-weighted ``S_dwell``, ``S_jumps``, ``S_root``, per-tip credibility ``S_cred`` and the span-integrated ``loglik``.
